# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/deanhowarth/spark_cutlass_bench/cutlass_sandbox/blackwell/dsa-2000-monorepo/packages/ftd/build
# It was generated by CMake: /usr/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//Build the testing tree.
BUILD_TESTING:BOOL=ON

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/addr2line

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ar

//Choose the type of build, options are: DEVEL;RELEASE;STRICT;DEBUG;HOSTDEBUG;SANITIZE
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE:STRING=DEVEL

//Enable/Disable color output during build.
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE:BOOL=ON

//CUDA architectures
CMAKE_CUDA_ARCHITECTURES:STRING=75

//CUDA compiler
CMAKE_CUDA_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc

//Flags used by the CUDA compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the CUDA compiler during full (host+device) debug
// builds.
CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-G -g -fno-inline

//Flags used by the CUDA compiler during regular development builds.
CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_DEVEL:STRING='-g -O3 '

//Flags used by the CUDA compiler during host-debug builds.
CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_HOSTDEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CUDA compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-O1 -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CUDA compiler during release builds.
CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3 -Xcompiler ""

//Flags used by the CUDA compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the CUDA compiler during sanitizer debug builds.
CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_SANITIZE:STRING='-g -fno-inline "-fsanitize=address,undefined" '

//Flags used by the CUDA compiler during strict jenkins builds.
CMAKE_CUDA_FLAGS_STRICT:STRING=-O3

//Host compiler to be used by nvcc
CMAKE_CUDA_HOST_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/c++

//CXX compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/c++

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar-13

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-13

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the C++ compiler during full (host+device) debug
// builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g -fno-inline

//Flags used by the C++ compiler during regular development builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEVEL:STRING=-g -O3

//Flags used by the C++ compiler during host-debug builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_HOSTDEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C++ compiler during release builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING='-O3 '

//Flags used by the CXX compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C++ compiler during sanitizer debug builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_SANITIZE:STRING=-g -fno-inline "-fsanitize=address,undefined"

//Flags used by the C++ compiler during strict jenkins builds.
CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_STRICT:STRING=-Os

//C compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/cc

//A wrapper around 'ar' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_AR:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ar-13

//A wrapper around 'ranlib' adding the appropriate '--plugin' option
// for the GCC compiler
CMAKE_C_COMPILER_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcc-ranlib-13

//Flags used by the C compiler during all build types.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the C compiler during full (host+device) debug
// builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=-g -fno-inline

//Flags used by the C compiler during regular development builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEVEL:STRING=-g -O3

//Flags used by the C compiler during host-debug builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_HOSTDEBUG:STRING=-g

//Flags used by the C compiler during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=-Os -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during release builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=-O3

//Flags used by the C compiler during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=-O2 -g -DNDEBUG

//Flags used by the C compiler during sanitizer debug builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_SANITIZE:STRING=-g -fno-inline "-fsanitize=address,undefined"

//Flags used by the C compiler during strict jenkins builds.
CMAKE_C_FLAGS_STRICT:STRING=-Os

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_DLLTOOL:FILEPATH=CMAKE_DLLTOOL-NOTFOUND

//Flags used by the linker during all build types.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during DEVEL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEVEL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during sanitizer debug builds.
CMAKE_EXE_LINKER_FLAGS_SANITIZE:STRING=-fsanitize=address,undefined

//Enable/Disable output of compile commands during generation.
CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS:BOOL=

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/home/deanhowarth/spark_cutlass_bench/cutlass_sandbox/blackwell/dsa-2000-monorepo/packages/ftd/build/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=/home/deanhowarth/spark_cutlass_bench/cutlass_sandbox/blackwell/dsa-2000-monorepo/packages/ftd/build

CMAKE_LINKER:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ld

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gmake

// all build types.

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of modules during

CMAKE_MODULE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Value Computed by CMake

CMAKE_RANLIB:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/ranlib

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during all build types.

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries

// during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of shared libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//If set, runtime paths are not added when installing shared libraries,
// but are added when building.
CMAKE_SKIP_INSTALL_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//If set, runtime paths are not added when using shared libraries.
CMAKE_SKIP_RPATH:BOOL=NO

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during all build types.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during DEBUG builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during DEVEL builds.

// during MINSIZEREL builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_MINSIZEREL:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during RELEASE builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELEASE:STRING=

//Flags used by the linker during the creation of static libraries
// during RELWITHDEBINFO builds.
CMAKE_STATIC_LINKER_FLAGS_RELWITHDEBINFO:STRING=

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_STRIP:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/strip

//Path to a program.
CMAKE_TAPI:FILEPATH=CMAKE_TAPI-NOTFOUND

//If this value is on, makefiles will be generated without the
// .SILENT directive, and all commands will be echoed to the console
// during the make.  This is useful for debugging only. With Visual
// Studio IDE projects all commands are done without /nologo.
CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE:BOOL=FALSE

//Path to the coverage program that CTest uses for performing coverage
// inspection
COVERAGE_COMMAND:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/gcov

//Extra command line flags to pass to the coverage tool
COVERAGE_EXTRA_FLAGS:STRING=-l

//Don't create a package lock file in the binary path
CPM_DONT_CREATE_PACKAGE_LOCK:BOOL=OFF

//Don't update the module path to allow using find_package
CPM_DONT_UPDATE_MODULE_PATH:BOOL=OFF

//Always download dependencies from source
CPM_DOWNLOAD_ALL:BOOL=OFF

//Add all packages added through CPM.cmake to the package lock
CPM_INCLUDE_ALL_IN_PACKAGE_LOCK:BOOL=OFF

//Only use `find_package` to get dependencies
CPM_LOCAL_PACKAGES_ONLY:BOOL=OFF

//Directory to download CPM dependencies
CPM_SOURCE_CACHE:PATH=OFF

//Always try to use `find_package` to get dependencies
CPM_USE_LOCAL_PACKAGES:BOOL=OFF

//Use additional directory of package name in cache on the most
// nested level.
CPM_USE_NAMED_CACHE_DIRECTORIES:BOOL=OFF

//How many times to retry timed-out CTest submissions.
CTEST_SUBMIT_RETRY_COUNT:STRING=3

//How long to wait between timed-out CTest submissions.
CTEST_SUBMIT_RETRY_DELAY:STRING=5

CUTLASS_GEMM_API_LIB_PATH:FILEPATH=/home/deanhowarth/spark_cutlass_bench/cutlass_sandbox/blackwell/cutlass_interface_build/libcutlass_gemm_api.a

//Maximum time allowed before CTest will kill the test.
DART_TESTING_TIMEOUT:STRING=1500

//Path to a library.
DEDISP_API_LIB_PATH:FILEPATH=/home/deanhowarth/spark_cutlass_bench/cutlass_sandbox/blackwell/dedisp_tcfdd_build/libdedisp_api.a

//Directory under which to collect all populated content
FETCHCONTENT_BASE_DIR:PATH=/home/deanhowarth/spark_cutlass_bench/cutlass_sandbox/blackwell/dsa-2000-monorepo/packages/ftd/build/_deps

//Disables all attempts to download or update content and assumes
// source dirs already exist
FETCHCONTENT_FULLY_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables QUIET option for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_QUIET:BOOL=ON

//When not empty, overrides where to find pre-populated content
// for Eigen
FETCHCONTENT_SOURCE_DIR_EIGEN:PATH=

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior for all content population
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED:BOOL=OFF

//Enables UPDATE_DISCONNECTED behavior just for population of Eigen
FETCHCONTENT_UPDATES_DISCONNECTED_EIGEN:BOOL=OFF

//enable using alternative integer-to-float conversion
GGP_ALTERNATIVE_I_TO_F:BOOL=OFF

//Enable stacktrace generation using backwards-cpp
GGP_BACKWARDS:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
GGP_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/deanhowarth/spark_cutlass_bench/cutlass_sandbox/blackwell/dsa-2000-monorepo/packages/ftd/build

//build tests by default
GGP_BUILD_ALL_TESTS:BOOL=ON

//Build bench_pipeline benchmark executable
GGP_BUILD_BENCH_PIPELINE:BOOL=ON

//Build cutlass_interface + dedisp_tcfdd from source
GGP_BUILD_FROM_SOURCE:BOOL=OFF

//build the native FFT library according to GGP_TARGET
GGP_BUILD_NATIVE_FFT:BOOL=ON

//build the native blas/lapack library according to GGP_TARGET
GGP_BUILD_NATIVE_LAPACK:BOOL=ON

//build GGP as a shared lib
GGP_BUILD_SHAREDLIB:BOOL=ON

//Path to CUTLASS source tree (required when GGP_BUILD_FROM_SOURCE=ON)
GGP_CUTLASS_DIR:PATH=

//Enable CUTLASS GEMM interface (cutlass_interface)
GGP_CUTLASS_INTERFACE:BOOL=ON

//Source directory containing cutlass_gemm_api.h
GGP_CUTLASS_INTERFACE_INCLUDE:PATH=/home/deanhowarth/spark_cutlass_bench/cutlass_sandbox/blackwell/dsa-2000-monorepo/packages/ftd/cutlass_interface

//Path to cutlass_interface build directory (contains libcutlass_gemm_api.a
// and cutlass_gemm_api.h)
GGP_CUTLASS_INTERFACE_PATH:PATH=/home/deanhowarth/spark_cutlass_bench/cutlass_sandbox/blackwell/cutlass_interface_build

//set the CXX Standard (14 or 17)
GGP_CXX_STANDARD:STRING=17

//Enable FDD dedispersion library (dedisp_tcfdd)
GGP_DEDISP_TCFDD:BOOL=ON

//Source directory containing dedisp_api.h
GGP_DEDISP_TCFDD_INCLUDE:PATH=/home/deanhowarth/spark_cutlass_bench/cutlass_sandbox/blackwell/dsa-2000-monorepo/packages/ftd/dedisp_tcfdd

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
GGP_DEDISP_TCFDD_INCLUDE_PATH:UNINITIALIZED=/home/deanhowarth/spark_cutlass_bench/cutlass_sandbox/blackwell/dsa-2000-monorepo/packages/ftd/dedisp_tcfdd

//Path to dedisp_tcfdd build directory (contains libdedisp_api.a
// and dedisp_api.h)
GGP_DEDISP_TCFDD_PATH:PATH=/home/deanhowarth/spark_cutlass_bench/cutlass_sandbox/blackwell/dedisp_tcfdd_build

//Download Eigen
GGP_DOWNLOAD_EIGEN:BOOL=ON

//Download NVSHMEM
GGP_DOWNLOAD_NVSHMEM:BOOL=OFF

//Eigen use for GGP_DOWNLOAD_EIGEN
GGP_EIGEN_VERSION:STRING=3.4.0

//path to gdrcopy used when GGP_DOWNLOAD_NVSHMEM is enabled
GGP_GDRCOPY_HOME:STRING=/usr/local/gdrcopy

//generate doxygen documentation
GGP_GENERATE_DOXYGEN:BOOL=OFF

//Path to a file.
GGP_GITDIR:PATH=GGP_GITDIR-NOTFOUND

//set the GPU architecture (e.g. sm_70, sm_80, sm_90a, sm_100a,
// sm_121)
GGP_GPU_ARCH:STRING=sm_121

//set the GPU architecture suffix (virtual, real). Leave empty
// for no suffix.
GGP_GPU_ARCH_SUFFIX:STRING=

//enable heterogeneous atomic support ?
GGP_HETEROGENEOUS_ATOMIC:BOOL=ON

//install tests by default
GGP_INSTALL_ALL_TESTS:BOOL=ON

//add NVTX markup to interface calls
GGP_INTERFACE_NVTX:BOOL=OFF

//Value Computed by CMake
GGP_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//build GGP using Jitify
GGP_JITIFY:BOOL=OFF

//enable large kernel arg support
GGP_LARGE_KERNEL_ARG:BOOL=ON

//maximum number of simultaneous RHS in a kernel
GGP_MAX_MULTI_RHS:STRING=64

//Max shared memory per block, 0 corresponds to architecture default
GGP_MAX_SHARED_MEMORY:STRING=0

//build the MPI multi-GPU code
GGP_MPI:BOOL=OFF

//The list of multi-rhs sizes that get compiled
GGP_MULTIGRID_MRHS_LIST:STRING=16

//set to 'yes' to build the NVSHMEM multi-GPU code
GGP_NVSHMEM:BOOL=OFF

//path to NVSHMEM
GGP_NVSHMEM_HOME:PATH=

//enable OpenMP
GGP_OPENMP:BOOL=OFF

//which data order to use for Wilson, gauge (recon-8/9) and clover
// fixed-point fields (4, 8)
GGP_ORDER_FP:STRING=8

//which data order to use for fixed-point MG fields (2, 4, 8)
GGP_ORDER_FP_MG:STRING=2

//which data order to use for fp32 MG fields (2, 4)
GGP_ORDER_SP_MG:STRING=2

//which precisions to instantiate in GGP (4-bit number - double,
// single, half, quarter)
GGP_PRECISION:STRING=14

//which reconstructs to instantiate in GGP (3-bit number - 18,
// 13/12, 9/8)
GGP_RECONSTRUCT:STRING=7

//Value Computed by CMake
GGP_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/deanhowarth/spark_cutlass_bench/cutlass_sandbox/blackwell/dsa-2000-monorepo/packages/ftd

//Choose the type of target, options are: CUDA;HIP;SYCL
GGP_TARGET_TYPE:STRING=CUDA

//Enable TCC correlator engine
GGP_TCC:BOOL=OFF

//Path to TCC source tree (e.g. /path/to/tensor-core-correlator)
GGP_TCC_PATH:PATH=

//use EIGEN library (where optional)
GGP_USE_EIGEN:BOOL=ON

//display kernel register usage
GGP_VERBOSE_BUILD:BOOL=OFF

//Git command line client
GIT_EXECUTABLE:FILEPATH=/usr/bin/git

//Command to build the project
MAKECOMMAND:STRING=/usr/bin/cmake --build . --config "${CTEST_CONFIGURATION_TYPE}"

//Path to the memory checking command, used for memory error detection.
MEMORYCHECK_COMMAND:FILEPATH=/usr/local/cuda/bin/compute-sanitizer

//File that contains suppressions for the memory checker
MEMORYCHECK_SUPPRESSIONS_FILE:FILEPATH=

//CXX compiler flags for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_CXX_FLAGS:STRING=-fopenmp

//CXX compiler libraries for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_CXX_LIB_NAMES:STRING=gomp;pthread

//C compiler flags for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_C_FLAGS:STRING=-fopenmp

//C compiler libraries for OpenMP parallelization
OpenMP_C_LIB_NAMES:STRING=gomp;pthread

//Path to the gomp library for OpenMP
OpenMP_gomp_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib/gcc/aarch64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so

//Path to the pthread library for OpenMP
OpenMP_pthread_LIBRARY:FILEPATH=/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a

//Name of the computer/site where compile is being run
SITE:STRING=spark-9d31


########################
# INTERNAL cache entries
########################

//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_ADDR2LINE
CMAKE_ADDR2LINE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_AR
CMAKE_AR-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//STRINGS property for variable: CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE
CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE-STRINGS:INTERNAL=DEVEL;RELEASE;STRICT;DEBUG;HOSTDEBUG;SANITIZE
//This is the directory where this CMakeCache.txt was created
CMAKE_CACHEFILE_DIR:INTERNAL=/home/deanhowarth/spark_cutlass_bench/cutlass_sandbox/blackwell/dsa-2000-monorepo/packages/ftd/build
//Major version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MAJOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=3
//Minor version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MINOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=28
//Patch version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_PATCH_VERSION:INTERNAL=3
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE
CMAKE_COLOR_MAKEFILE-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Path to CMake executable.
CMAKE_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/cmake
//Path to cpack program executable.
CMAKE_CPACK_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/usr/bin/cpack

CPM_DRY_RUN:INTERNAL=OFF
